prompt:
Implement the publish pipeline from spec .agentic/specs/10-publish-pipeline-spec.md. This is a docs/infra task — your domain.

Three tasks:
1. Configure TypeDoc for HTML output (update typedoc.json, add docs script to package.json, add docs-html/ to .gitignore)
2. Create CI workflow at .github/workflows/ci.yml
3. Create Release workflow at .github/workflows/release.yml

Follow the spec exactly. After implementation, self-validate: run quality gates, verify docs build produces valid HTML, verify all existing tests still pass.
